form.formComment: Comes off a (19.56) win last time, scoring by half a length in a Grade 4/5 over 340m at Gunnedah. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 10 starts. Among the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes off a (19.56) win last time, scoring by half a length in a Grade 4/5 over 340m at Gunnedah. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 10 starts. Among the main chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and lost ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.08) at Gunnedah in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Strong record off the draw with four wins and two minors from seven starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.08) at Gunnedah in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Strong record off the draw with four wins and two minors from seven starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered and carried wider rounding the first turn.
Tightened for room shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 22.46 over 400m at this track. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 22.46 over 400m at this track. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: In the money last time at The Gardens (30.11) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 5 length third. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and nine minors. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 22.10. Has clocked a scorching 22.02 here at this trip. Leading player.

formComments.comment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 22.10. Has clocked a scorching 22.02 here at this trip. Leading player.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last five starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a NG on April 6 over 400m at this track behind Blazin' Fire beaten 6 lengths (22.67). Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last five starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a NG on April 6 over 400m at this track behind Blazin' Fire beaten 6 lengths (22.67). Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced tightly on the run to the turn, was galloped on soon after and fell.
Galloped on heels at first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.81) when third at this track in a NG. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks a place chance at best.
